string: To protect your data, let Chrome remove permissions from sites that you haven’t visited recently
Chrome regularly checks to make sure your browser has the safest settings. We'll let you know if anything needs review.
Can’t check passwords on this device
No saved passwords in your Google Account
No compromised passwords in your Google Account
No compromised passwords on this device
If your passwords are compromised, we’ll let you know
No saved passwords on this device
Chrome can check your passwords when you save them
Your organization turned off saving passwords
You can review sites that send a lot of notifications and stop them from sending more in the future
Unsubscribed from %1$s. You'll be asked again on your next visit.
Chrome will let you know about sites that may be sending too many notifications
You can stop these sites from sending future notifications
To check for compromised passwords, sign in to your Google Account
Chrome automatically removes permissions from sites that abuse notifications or that you haven’t visited recently
To help keep you safe, permissions were removed from some sites
%1$s, %2$s, and more • Chrome removed these permissions because you haven’t visited recently
%1$s • Chrome removed these permissions because you haven’t visited recently
%1$s, %2$s, %3$s • Chrome removed these permissions because you haven’t visited recently
%1$s, %2$s • Chrome removed these permissions because you haven’t visited recently
Strengthen your passwords in your Google Account
Strengthen your passwords on this device
Your organization turned on Enhanced Safe Browsing
Turn on Safe Browsing to get protection against dangerous sites
Your organization turned off Safe Browsing
Your organization turned on Safe Browsing
Incognito mode keeps your browsing private from others who use your device
Chrome warns you about unsafe sites and downloads
With tools from Chrome, you can browse safely and stay in control
Learn how Chrome keeps you safe
To check for compromised passwords, go to Google Password Manager
New version of Chrome is available
The file with the same filename already exists. If you want to import it, please modify the filename or delete the old file.

There is no input box in the current web page. This function is not available. This function is used to save the contents of the input box you fill in in the web page, such as saving account and password
There is no record that password saving has been forbidden to pop up
do you want to keep this sort result?
%1$s groups saved (will close tabs and delete groups)
save the number of submissions? (including account password)
Manipulated the scaling gesture, but the webpage did not scale. At this time, the forced mode will be activated, and scaling again will work.
place qrcode/barcode in box to scan
Place the code within the frame

Intelligent scheduling will stop the expansion operation at a certain time to optimize the web page response. You can click OK to demonstrate how to set the scheduling whitelist from the expansion details.

The request to add an icon has been initiated. If there is no response, please open system settings - find this app - rights management - create desktop shortcut. Turn on this permission and try again
Enter your screen lock to continue

The Script Manager has been updated. The previous manager and its internal scripts are no longer valid. You can switch back to the original Script Manager, but we recommend migrating to the new Script Manager as soon as possible.
Full Screen Mode: Slide to hide top
Slide to adjust brightness and sound
rule error, please check the tutorial text
rule error, please check whether the link is complete
please enter the full link of the source
Search suggestions and related search history
You can choose your search engine
These search engines are popular in your region and are shown in random order
You can change your default anytime in settings
You can change this later in Settings
You can enter a URL or your question
The search engine searches for this IP
Conveniently Switch Search Engines with AI Assistance
Search engine recommendations related to your query
Suggested searches based on your last tab
Enter your question and AI will find the answer for you
Quickly start a search in Chrome
Secure payment credential authentication sheet is closed
Secure payment credential authentication sheet is opened
Unlock your screen in the next step, typically using your fingerprint. Or you can BEGIN_LINKverify another wayEND_LINK.
Secure payment credential no matching credential sheet is closed
Secure payment credential no matching credential sheet
Secure payment credential no matching credential sheet is opened
You chose to verify with %1$s on websites that use %2$s. This provider may have stored information about your payment method, which you can BEGIN_LINKrequest to be deletedEND_LINK.
Please select a home page style
The webpage is requesting access to images. Please choose your selection method (Different methods require different permissions: Camera permission, Storage permission, etc.)
Select an internal directory (external SD card is not supported for now)
Please select where the sidebar appears
Please select the Firefox account server partition
Select your web page font (the following is the font in the system fonts directory)
Failed to send verification code, please check the network
Sending the current webpage to Firefox browser
To send this tab to another device, sign in to Chrome there
List of devices to share a tab with.
List of devices to share a tab with is closed.
List of devices to share a tab with opened at full height.
List of devices to share a tab with opened at half height.
Send current webpage to other devices
%1$s wants to connect to a serial port
Tap to return to the site
Server response error, please try again later
You can always delete ad-measurement data by deleting your browsing data
Chrome limits the total amount of data that sites can share through the browser to measure ad performance

Your Android device may include a similar setting. If Ad measurement is turned on in Chrome and on your Android device, a company may be able to measure the effectiveness of an ad across web sites you visit and apps you use.

Google requires companies to state publicly that they won't use this data to track you across sites. Some sites may use your activity to personalize your experience for more than just ads. They may also combine it with other information they already know about you. Companies are responsible for letting you know how they use your data. Learn more about how Google protects your data in our <link>Privacy Policy</link>.
Limited types of data are shared between sites to measure the performance of their ads, such as whether you made a purchase after visiting a site
Ad-measurement data is deleted regularly from your device
Your browsing history is kept private on your device and reports are sent with a delay to protect your identity
Sites and advertisers can measure the performance of their ads
Manage info used by sites to measure ad performance
Chromium auto-deletes ad topics that are older than 4 weeks

Google requires companies to state publicly that they won't use this data to track you across sites. Some sites may use your activity to personalize your experience for more than just ads. They may also combine it with other information they already know about you. Companies are responsible for letting you know how they use your data. Learn more in our <link>Privacy Policy</link>.

Google requires companies to state publicly that they won't use this data to track you across sites. Some sites may use your activity to personalize your experience for more than just ads. They may also store ad topics for longer than 4 weeks and combine it with other information they already know about you. Companies are responsible for letting you know how they use your data. Learn more in our <link>Privacy Policy</link>.

Whether an ad you see is personalized can depend on many things including this setting, <link1>site-suggested ads</link1>, your <link2>cookie settings</link2>, and if the site you're viewing personalizes ads.
Topics are based on your recent browsing history and help limit what sites and their advertising partners can learn about you to show you personalized ads
Secure DNS may not be available all the time
Allow sites to check if you have payment methods saved
Sites can use third-party cookies to personalize content and ads, and learn about actions you take on other sites
When you're in Incognito mode, Chromium blocks sites from using third-party cookies
Site features that rely on third-party cookies should work as expected
Sites that rely on third-party cookies should work as expected
Sites can't use third-party cookies to personalize content and ads, and learn about actions you take on other sites, unless you allow related sites to access them
Site features that rely on third-party cookies may not work
Sites can still use cookies to see browsing activity on their own site
Some features may not work. Related sites can still use third-party cookies.
Added site back to potential sites
Add a site back if you want it in the pool of sites that can guess what you like
When on, a list of sites you visit that guess your interests appears here
No sites to show right now
For sites that don’t support secure connections, get warned before visiting the site
Warns you for insecure public sites
Warns you for insecure public & private sites
Private sites might include things like your company’s intranet
Use HTTPS whenever possible and get warned before loading sites that don’t support it
For sites that don’t support secure connections, get warned before visiting the site. You can’t change this setting because you have Advanced Protection enabled.
Use HTTPS whenever possible and get warned before loading sites that don’t support it. You can’t change this setting because you have Advanced Protection enabled.
<link>Turn on screen lock in Android settings</link>
Use screen lock to see open Incognito tabs
Lock Incognito tabs when you leave Chrome
When you make purchases in Chrome, see eWallet and Pix as options
When you make purchases in Chrome, see eWallet as an option
Enable redirection to supported payment apps
When you make purchases in Chrome, see non-card payment methods as an option
When you make purchases in Chrome, see Pix as an option
Blocking %1$s will also block any related topics, even if the topic is active

Manage in <link_android_advanced_protection>Android settings</link_android_advanced_protection>
Advanced Protection controls these Chrome settings: • "Always use secure connections" is on. • "JavaScript optimizer" is off. <link_javascript_optimizer>Manage Site exceptions</link_javascript_optimizer>
You can see your ad topics in Chromium settings and block the ones you don't want shared with sites

Some sites may use your activity to personalize your experience for more than just ads. They may also store ad topics for longer than 4 weeks and may combine it with other information they already know about you

Google requires companies to state publicly that they won't use this data to track you across sites. Companies are responsible for letting you know how they use your data. <link>Learn more in our Privacy Policy</link>.
Chromium notes topics of interest based on your recent browsing history. For example, things like Sports, Apparel, and more
Websites and their advertising partners can use ad topics to personalize content for you. Compared to third-party cookies, ad topics helps to limit what sites can learn about you as you browse
Chromium auto-deletes ad topics that are older than 4 weeks
Please verify that this is a valid provider or try again later
Determines how to connect to websites over a secure connection
This setting is disabled on managed browsers
This setting is disabled because parental controls are on
See this provider's privacy policy
You can block sites you don't want. Chromium also auto-deletes sites from the list that are older than 30 days.

Google requires companies to state publicly that they won't use this data to track you across sites. Some sites may use your activity to personalize your experience for more than just ads. They may also combine it with other information they already know about you. Companies are responsible for letting you know how they use your data. Learn more in our <link>Privacy Policy</link>.

Your activity is one of the many things a site can use to suggest ads. When site-suggested ads is turned off, sites can still show you ads but they may be less personalized. Learn more about <link>site-suggested ads</link>.
Whether an ad you see is personalized can depend on many things including this setting, <link1>ad topics</link1>, your <link2>cookie settings</link2>, and if the site you're viewing personalizes ads.

Site-suggested ads help protect your browsing history and identity while allowing sites to show you relevant ads. Using your activity, other sites can suggest related ads as you continue browsing. You can see a list of these sites and block the ones you don't want in settings.

For example, if you visit a site to find recipes for dinner, the site might decide that you're interested in cooking. Later, another site may show you a related ad for a grocery delivery service suggested by the first site.

Chromium deletes any activity data that you've shared with sites after 30 days. If you visit a site again it may reappear on the list. Learn more about <link>managing your ad privacy in Chromium</link>.
Websites and their advertising partners can use your activity, such as how you spend your time on sites you visit, to personalize ads for you
Topics older than 4 weeks get auto-deleted
When a topic is blocked, it won't be used to personalize ads
When on, a list of topics appears here based on your recent browsing history
You don't have any active topics yet

Ad topics are just one of many things a site can use to personalize ads. Even without ad topics, sites can still show you ads but they may be less personalized. Learn more about <link1>managing your ad privacy</link1>.
Choose which broad categories of topics can be used to help personalize ads
Choose which broad categories of topics can be used to help personalize ads. Turning off a broader category will also block its related topics. <link>Learn more</link>
Topics are based on your recent browsing history and are used by sites to show you personalized ads while protecting your identity
This topic is unblocked and may become active based on your browsing history
Failed to enter the setting page. Please open the suspended window permission manually
Please configure this function under professional guidance, otherwise it may cause the webpage to fail to load or load slowly! Keep this in mind.
download the play script to find the video play function. There are some learning costs. After adapting, it is like a fish in water
Share titles and the URLs of open tabs from this device with the operating system
I have a good song to share with you~
List of sharing options is closed.
List of sharing options at full height.
List of sharing options opened at half height.
You have disabled Storage access, please go to Settings to enable it.
Drag to take a long screenshot
Can’t go lower. Try starting from further down the page.
Can’t go higher. Try starting from further up the page.
If this function hurts your rights and interests
the current page has been windowed, please create a new page

The traditional left and right gestures have a high probability of false touch. Starting from this version, try to use the upper left/right gesture as a substitute. The specific manipulation is shown in the figure.
When launched from another app, display the back button
you can click edge to show progress

it is inevitable to expand resources that compete with web pages. Both of them are loaded at the same time, resulting in slowdowns. Through intelligent control, the web page can be loaded first at a reasonable time, which can better ensure your use experience. If you close it, you need to know that when installing multiple extensions, the web page will obviously stagnate
Control how your browsing history is used to personalize Search and more
Control how browsing history is used with your other data across Google services
Sign out and turn off sync
After you sign out, your bookmarks, passwords, and more in your Google Account will be removed from this device.
Deleting your browsing data doesn't sign you out of your Google Account. To do so, <link1>sign out of Chrome</link1>.
Signed out. Sign back in to use the bookmarks, passwords and more in your account.
Some of your Chrome data hasn’t been saved in your Google Account yet. Try waiting a few minutes before signing out. If you sign out now, this data will be deleted.
Check if the selected account is supported.
Check that you chose the right account
Your stored sign-in info might be out of date
Get your bookmarks, passwords, and more on all your devices
Sign in to this site and Chrome
To send this tab to another device, sign in to Chrome on both devices
Sign in to this site and Chrome to get your bookmarks and more on all your devices
Choose "More details" below to get more information from %1$s.
If this issue keeps happening, choose "More details" below to get more information from %1$s.
If this issue keeps happening, <link_more_details>get more information</link_more_details> from %1$s.
You can try other ways to continue on %1$s.
If this issue keeps happening, you can try other ways to continue on %1$s.
To help improve the app, Chrome sends usage and crash data to Google. <UMA_LINK>Manage</UMA_LINK>
By continuing, you agree to the <TOS_LINK>Terms of Service</TOS_LINK>.
Sign in to get your bookmarks, passwords, and more on all your devices
Sign in to get the most out of Chrome
Help make Chrome better for people who use it the way you do

Info is sent to Google about your Chrome usage, but it isn’t tied to you
If Chrome crashes, details about the crash may include some personal info
If you sync your history to your Google Account, metrics may also include info about URLs you visit
This option is unavailable right now.
Sign in to get your bookmarks and more on all your devices
To easily pick up where you left off, sync your history and tabs
Sign in to get content based on your interests
To see tabs from your other devices, sync your tabs and history
See your history on other devices
You’ll find your tabs from other devices here
If you're online but this issue keeps happening, you can try other ways to continue on %1$s.
Get your bookmarks, passwords and more on all your devices
This option is unavailable right now.
Because you're signing out of an account managed by %1$s, your Chrome data will be deleted from this device. It will remain in your Google Account.
Delete your Chrome data from this device?
Some Chrome features won’t be available anymore
Easily Manage Permissions for Web Usage
Only icons without separate font color settings can be uniformly used as the default color number. Whether to clear all individual font color settings

This will reset all the sites in your list to the default zoom
Sites that you save a custom zoom level for will appear here
When on, sites can show any ad to you. When off, sites can’t show intrusive or misleading ads.
Any site you visit can show any ad to you
Ads are blocked on sites known to show intrusive or misleading ads
Sites can save data on your device
Sites aren't allowed to save data on your device
When the software enters the background, extend sleep to reduce power and memory usage.
The web page executes slow code, which may cause the web page to jam and the browser to flash back. Do you want to stop the execution of this code

you have added %1$s files to download. The download path is: %2$s. please operate the files in the corresponding directory. Due to the restrictions of Android permission policy, the file access path is deep. Sorry for the inconvenience
checked,you can get resource link to websites

Association sniffing: if the current page keyword is video content, but the video file cannot be sniffed, this keyword will be used to associate resources through Baidu search engine. If you are a webmaster, this may infringe your rights and interests. Please go back to the solution below.
Consumes a lot, should be turned off on demand
Chrome can use Sogou for search in China. You can change this in Settings.
Some of your passwords aren’t accessible
Google speech engine can't be found
Levitation mode sliding adjustment of brightness and sound
The certificate is invalid, it may be that the certificate of this website has expired, if the website is OK, please check whether your device certificate has been tampered with
there are still bookmarks under the tag, which cannot be deleted directly
according to the settings, the app that will open the web page request for you
start merging. The merging time is related to the file size
This extension has been prohibited from taking effect on the web page after the current web page is running (other pages will not be affected)!!!
Total data used by Chrome, including accounts, bookmarks, and saved settings
This will clear cookies, cache, and other data of sites Chrome doesn't think is important.
All Chrome’s extension data will be deleted permanently.
All Chrome’s app data will be deleted permanently. This includes all files, settings, accounts, databases, etc.
All data stored by sites, including cookies and other locally stored data
Stored data that Chrome doesn't think is important (e.g. sites with no saved settings or that you don't visit often)
This feature requires storage permission to allow the app to access system files for selection.
current application lose necessary permissions. Please click"Settings"-"Permissions"-Open the required permissions. Finally, you can return by clicking the back button twice.
Prevent this page from creating additional dialogs
are you sure you want to quit playing?
you havent got advanced permission yet. Just move your finger to get it. Confirm exit?
This is a file read from the local external download directory. Clicking OK will delete this file
Addresses aren't encrypted with your passphrase. This lets you use them in other Google services.
Sync with Firefox Browser via Firefox Account

Payment methods and addresses won’t be encrypted. Browsing history from Chrome won’t sync. Only someone with your passphrase can read your encrypted data. The passphrase is not sent to or stored by Google. If you forget your passphrase or want to change this setting, BEGIN_LINKclear the Chrome data in your accountEND_LINK.
Your data is encrypted with your passphrase. Enter it to use and save Chrome data in your Google Account.
To save and use new passwords in your Google Account, update Google Play services
Could not connect to the sync server.
The service is not available; try again later.
Sync is disabled by your administrator
Cloud data update detected. Sync now? (Confirm: Download cloud data to overwrite local; Cancel: Force upload local data to overwrite cloud)
Sync needs to verify it's you

Passphrase encryption doesn’t include payment methods and addresses from Google Pay.
To change this setting, BEGIN_LINKdelete the Chrome data in your accountEND_LINK.
If you forgot your passphrase or want to change this setting, BEGIN_LINKdelete the Chrome data in your accountEND_LINK.
Use your own passphrase to encrypt all the Chrome data in your Google Account
Use Google’s default encryption for the passwords in your Google Account
Payment methods and other info from Google Wallet
Payment methods, offers, and addresses using Google Pay
Note: Initial login may take some time to synchronize, please be patient; click here to synchronize immediately.
The browser will automatically synchronize at a certain time, and you can also synchronize manually. Are you sure you want to synchronize?
Synchronizing progress. If prompted frequently, please uncheck synchronization in the upper right corner

we have done some illegal word / copyright filtering, but the crawler is non directional, we cannot be perfect. When you find that the search results infringe your rights and interests / the content is illegal, please complain to us and we will deal with it as soon as possible
please input your complaint reason and suggest to leave your contact information
See price drops on your tabs

Affects the sites listed here. Inserting “[*.]” before a domain name creates an exception for the entire domain. For example, adding “[*.]google.com” means that third-party cookies can also be active for mail.google.com, because it’s part of google.com.
Sites allowed to use third-party cookies
Features on some sites may not work
Try pausing tracking protections on this site, which can help site features work as expected.
Tracking protections are paused on this site
Translation function can only be implemented in web pages!
Oops. This page could not be translated.
Smart Mode (Automatically enabled based on network conditions)
Font file parsing error, please try again or replace font file
Push web videos to the native player for a more powerful playback experience. Only supports unencrypted videos; if push fails, the video may be encrypted.

You are about to turn on the freeze mode. When your web page is abnormal, turn on the freeze mode to temporarily prohibit all Extensions operations in the page. To determine whether it is caused by Extensions.

You'll see your %1$s sign-in status, browsing data, and site data in Chrome
"%1$s" and "%2$s" tab groups no longer available

Extensions has been completely frozen. Click restart
This will modify the global browser identifier, which may cause web page abnormalities. Please try to use independent web page settings as much as possible.
This website has enabled an independent UA setting. Please go to the website settings to modify it.
Your changes will take effect the next time you relaunc.
Theme settings - icon pop-up and other styles
The tabs will remain open on this device but the group will be deleted from all devices signed into %1$s
The tabs will remain open on this device but the group will be permanently deleted

If the server cannot be found, please check the device data or wifi connection. If the device network is normal, it is mostly shielded /DNS pollution by the operator. Please customize DNS/ use proxy software. It is also possible that this URL does not exist, please check whether the input is incorrect
Update failed. There may be no latest version. Please try again later
Your device couldn’t open Chrome. To fix the issue, download the latest Chrome update from your app store.
Download link: xxx contact email: xxxx
Upload Local and Download Cloud Data
An error occurred and the file could not be read. You can click OK to see how to solve the error
Upload failed. Please try again later
Upload failed, server returned abnormal data

·If you are an ordinary user and can not find the Extensions you want in the Extensions store, you can enter the Extensions name or download address. N. if you are a developer, please place the compressed package in the network disk and fill in the link here. N in order to ensure the safety of users, the Extensions will be put on the shelves after review and signature. Expand compatibility with Google / Firefox. If you leave your email, you will be notified when it is on the shelf.

This Extensions needs to be uploaded to the server for signature. Click OK to upload this file to the server. The signature will be put on the shelves to expand the store for you to download. Please give priority to the Extensions store to inquire about the Extensions you need. The store contains the vast majority of Extensions in the market
Sends URLs of pages you visit to Google
Automatically sends usage statistics and crash reports to Google
Help improve Chrome’s features and performance

You can see sites you visit in Chrome and set timers for them.
Google gets info about the sites you set timers for and how long you visit them. This info is used to make Digital Wellbeing better.
Show your Chrome activity in Digital Wellbeing?
Sites you visit in Chrome won't show. All site timers will be deleted.
Remove your Chrome activity from Digital Wellbeing?
Remove your Chrome activity from Digital Wellbeing
Your %1$s timer ran out. It'll start again tomorrow.
Tap to return to the site
use any browser on computer to open this link
You have already used the custom toolbar, please go to the custom interface and click the custom button to bind the event.
Use Floating Ball for Control Display
When turned off, it means responding only to gestures for display/hide.
gesture in the lower half screen
Here, you will find some usage help to assist you in mastering this more quickly.
The current extension is installed using a compatibility framework, which may cause issues. You can try installing the native Firefox extension. Click confirm to reinstall.
Manage tabs using a desktop-like interface.
Open Same Domain URLs with Mini Program Page
Use Snackbar to display download progress
are you authorized to log on to the rainsee account
Real time Chinese English translation in text selection

Yu Jian search is an aggregation search engine based on local crawler algorithm and online crawling information. Yu Jianfang uses the truncation scheme to protect your information from being obtained by other parties. Yujianfang does not provide any data sources. If you find any illegal information or services in the process of searching, please press the search results for a long time and we will guide you to the source website to report. As the local algorithm crawls all the websites that are normally operated, Yu Jianfang does not bear any responsibility. If you agree to this agreement, you can continue to use it. Otherwise, please switch to the search engine
Click to enter, long press to sort
[%1$s] is the same as the version number of the currently installed version. Please do not repeat the installation
A site is using your camera and microphone
A site is using your camera
Intelligent detection of wide and high processing rotation
Movable form in the current area click the edge area to jump out of the function bar
Video links generally have an effective time, that is, to prevent chain theft. If it cannot be played, long press to go to the original play page to view
Autoplay audio and video on Wifi only

the video mode will extract and integrate the content from the web page search results through sniffing and other schemes, which can provide a better playing experience, but there may be mistakes in the drama. If this function infringes your copyright, please click the complaint / corresponding webpage in the upper right corner to take your copyright content off the shelves.
The first chapter is just when China is in a period of temporary economic difficulties
Download the reading app and read the whole novel for free

as the author is nearing graduation,choosing a job in a tangled stage means that the browser is broken and the browser can not survive.Therefore, you can also obtain the membership rights by watching the advertisement on the basis of retaining the original function without charging. Thank you for your support of browser

Vulkan can utilize hardware resources more efficiently and improve rendering performance. However, it may cause screen artifacts on some devices, so it is not recommended to enable it; on some rooted devices, disabling it may prevent web pages from rendering.
Please wait until the file is downloaded to perform this operation.
Please wait for the page to finish loading
please wait for resources to load
This manipulation can only be performed on Web pages
To follow a site, go to the site, open the Chrome menu, and tap Follow.
Keep up with your favorite sites
You're offline. Check your internet connection and try again.
Soon, you’ll see stories from %1$s when you open a new tab. Sites you follow are saved in your Google account. You can manage them in Discover settings.
Soon, you'll see content from and about %1$s in Following. The sites and searches you follow are saved in your Google Account. You can manage your follows in settings at any time.
You'll now see stories from %1$s when you open a new tab. Sites you follow are saved in your Google account. You can manage them in Discover settings.
You'll now see content from and about %1$s in Following. The sites and searches you follow are saved in your Google Account. You can manage your follows in settings at any time.
Failed to read web page icon
The webpage has already enabled the green background. Please open the webpage to try it out.
The current webpage needs some permissions to use the corresponding functions. Denying them may cause certain functions to not work properly. The requested permissions are:
Secondary permission request query (off means allowed by default)
reading mode needs to be set under the webpage
Web page requests full screen display for better experience
Web page requests media devices such as microphones
webpage is requesting external address, do you want to allow
Please wait while the web page is loading.
Due to web security restrictions or the video not being in a playback state, full functionality cannot be provided.
Scroll to the top of the web page
'%1$s' is out of date. Please re-install the app.
'%1$s' is out of date. Please update the app.
Establishing a tunnel via proxy server failed
Tap to copy the URL for this app
If this web app is trying to trick you into thinking it's a different app, uninstall it.
This passkey will be saved to your password manager. Anyone with access to it will be able to use this passkey.
If page not normal,please click me
x5 failed load. Click to repair
System WebView, click me to switch
X5 kernel, website exception, please click me to switch
This website has disabled the automatic pop-up of the smart player
please go to your mobile phone settings to enable the above permissions, and then refresh the interface
This action will delete all local data, including cookies, and reset all permissions for %1$s and all sites under it
Are you sure you want to delete all local data, including cookies, and reset all permissions for this website?
Don’t apply dark theme for a specific site
Allow a site to download multiple files automatically.
Allow Background Sync for a specific site.
Allow third-party sign-in for a specific site.
Block third-party sign-in for a specific site.
Allow JavaScript for a specific site.
Block JavaScript for a specific site.
Allow site to use V8 optimizer.
Block site from using V8 optimizer.
Allow sound for a specific site.
Mute sound for a specific site.
Sites usually show ads so that they can provide content or services free of charge. But, some sites are known to show intrusive or misleading ads.
Sites can ask to create a 3D map of your surroundings or track camera position
Don't allow sites to create a 3D map of your surroundings or track camera position
Sites usually track your camera position for AR features, like games or heads-up directions
Sites can ask to automatically download multiple files
Don't allow sites to automatically download multiple files
Sites might automatically download related files together to save you time
Don't allow sites to enter picture-in-picture automatically
Sites use this feature to enter picture-in-picture automatically. This lets you continue watching a video, while freeing up your screen for other tasks.
Recently closed sites can finish sending and receiving data
Don't allow closed sites to finish sending or receiving data
After closing a page, tasks you started might not finish
After you leave a site, it can keep syncing to finish tasks, like uploading photos or sending a chat message
Site can ask for your camera
Don't allow sites to see your location
Features that need a camera won't work
Sites usually use your video camera for communication features like video chatting
When on, sites can ask to track your camera position and learn about your surroundings. When off, sites can’t track your camera position or learn about your surroundings.
Ask before allowing sites to create a 3D map of your surroundings or track camera position (recommended)
Block sites from creating a 3D map of your surroundings or tracking camera position
Apply dark theme to sites when Chrome uses dark theme, when possible
Don’t apply dark theme to sites
When on, sites can ask to automatically download multiple files. When off, sites can’t automatically download multiple files.
When on, sites can enter picture-in-picture automatically. When off, sites can’t enter picture-in-picture automatically.
Don't allow sites to enter picture-in-picture automatically
When on, recently-closed sites can finish sending and receiving data. When off, recently-closed sites can’t finish sending or receiving data.
When on, sites can ask to use Bluetooth devices. When off, sites can’t use Bluetooth devices.
Ask before allowing sites to connect to a device (recommended)
Block sites from connecting to devices
When on, sites can ask to look for Bluetooth devices. When off, sites can’t look for Bluetooth devices.
Ask when a site wants to discover nearby Bluetooth devices (recommended)
When on, sites can ask to use your camera. When off, sites can’t use your camera.
Ask first before allowing sites to use your camera (recommended)
When on, sites can ask to see text and images saved to your clipboard. When off, sites can’t see text or images saved to your clipboard.
Ask before allowing sites to read text and images from the clipboard (recommended)
Block sites from reading text and images from the clipboard
A company can define a group of sites that can use cookies to share your activity in the group. This is off in Incognito.
Allow related sites to see your activity in the group
When on, the desktop view of websites is shown. When off, the mobile view of websites is shown.
When on, sites can show sign-in prompts. When off, sites can't show sign-in prompts.
Sites can show sign-in prompts from identity services.
Block sign-in prompts from identity services.
When on, sites can ask to track your hands. When off, sites can’t track your hands.
Ask before allowing sites to track your hands (recommended)
Don't allow sites to track your hands
When on, sites can ask to know when you’re actively using your device. When off, sites can’t know when you’re actively using your device.
Ask when a site wants to know when you're actively using this device
Block sites from knowing when you're actively using this device
When on, sites can use JavaScript. When off, sites can’t use JavaScript.
When on, Chrome runs faster and features that use JavaScript should work as designed. When off, this reduces performance but makes V8 more resistant to attacks.
Sites are faster but less secure
Sites are slower but more secure
V8 is Chrome’s JavaScript and WebAssembly engine used to improve site performance
Speed up sites with Chrome's V8 engine but make Chrome slightly less resistant to attacks
When on, sites can ask to connect to any device on your local network. When off, sites can’t connect to devices on your local network.
Sites can ask to connect to any device on your local network
Don’t allow sites to connect to any device on your local network
When on, sites can ask for your location. When off, sites can’t see your location.
Ask before allowing sites to know your location (recommended)
When on, sites can ask to use your microphone. When off, sites can’t use your microphone.
Ask first before allowing sites to use your microphone (recommended)
When on, sites can use your device’s motion sensors. When off, sites can’t use motion sensors.
Allow sites to access motion sensors (recommended)
Block sites from accessing motion sensors
When on, sites can ask to use NFC devices. When off, sites can’t use NFC devices.
Ask before allowing sites to see and change information on NFC devices (recommended)
Block sites from seeing and changing information on NFC devices
When on, sites can ask to send notifications. When off, sites can’t send notifications.
Sites can ask to send notifications
Sites can't ask to send notifications
Use quieter messaging (blocks notification prompts from interrupting you)
When on, sites can use pop-ups and redirects. When off, sites can’t use pop-ups and redirects.
Block sites from showing pop-ups and redirects (recommended)
Allow sites to play protected content (recommended)
Ask before allowing sites to play protected content
Block sites from playing protected content
When on, sites can use your device’s sensors. When off, sites can’t use sensors.
When on, sites can ask to use serial ports. When off, sites can’t use serial ports.
Ask before allowing sites to connect to a device (recommended)
Block sites from connecting to devices
When on, sites can play sound. When off, sites can’t play sound.
When on, sites can ask to use information they've saved about you. When off, sites can't ask you to use info they've saved about you.
Sites can ask to use information they've saved about you
Sites are blocked from asking you to use information they've saved about you
When on, sites can ask to use USB devices. When off, sites can’t use USB devices.
Ask before allowing sites to connect to a device (recommended)
Block sites from connecting to devices
When on, sites can ask to use virtual reality devices. When off, sites can’t use virtual reality devices.
Ask before allowing sites to use your virtual reality device and data (recommended)
Block sites from using your virtual reality device and data
When on, sites can ask to manage windows on all your displays. When off, sites can’t manage windows on all your displays.
Sites can ask to manage windows on all your displays
Don’t allow sites to manage windows on all your displays
Sites can ask to see text and images on your clipboard
Don't allow sites to see text or images on your clipboard
Sites usually read your clipboard for features like keeping the formatting of text that you copied
You can ask to see the desktop version of sites
Include all sites under this domain
Sites can show sign-in prompts from identity services
Block sign-in prompts from identity services
Lets you sign in to websites using the account that you have with an identity service
Sites can ask to edit files and folders on your device
Don't allow sites to edit files or folders on your device
Files this site can view or edit
Sites usually access files and folders on your device for features like automatically saving your work
Sites can ask to know when you're actively using your device
Don't allow sites to know when you're actively using your device
Sites usually detect when you're actively using your device to set your availability on chat apps
Don't allow sites to use JavaScript
Speed up sites with Chrome's V8 engine but make Chrome slightly less resistant to attacks
Do not speed up sites with Chrome's V8 engine but make Chrome slightly more resistant to attacks
Sites usually use JavaScript to display interactive features, like video games or web forms
Exceptions for specific websites disallowed because Android device does not have enough RAM.
Sites can ask to connect to any device on your local network
Don’t allow sites to connect to any device on your local network
Sites can use this feature to look for and connect to any device on your local network
Sites can ask for your location
Don't allow sites to see your location
Sites usually use your location for relevant features or info, like local news or nearby shops
Sites can ask for your microphone
Don't allow sites to use your microphone
Features that need a microphone won't work
Sites usually use your microphone for communication features like video chatting
Don't allow sites to use motion sensors
Features that need motion sensors won't work
Sites usually use your device's motion sensors for features like virtual reality or fitness tracking
Sites can ask to use NFC devices
Don't allow sites to use NFC devices
Sites usually use near-field communication (NFC) to work with nearby tags or devices, like scanning badges or tapping to pay
Don't allow sites to send notifications
Sites usually send notifications to let you know about breaking news or chat messages.
Control this site's access to your device
Sites usually use your location for relevant features or info, like local news or nearby shops
Sites might send pop-ups to show ads, or use redirects to lead you to websites you may not want to visit
Sites can send pop-ups and use redirects
Don't allow sites to send pop-ups and use redirects
Sites can ask to play protected content
Don't allow sites to play protected content
To play content protected by copyright, sites may need to use a content protection service. <link>Learn more</link>
Sites can ask to connect to serial ports
Don't allow sites to connect to serial ports
Sites usually connect to serial ports for data transfer features, like setting up your network
Speed up sites with Chrome's V8 engine but make Chrome slightly less resistant to attacks
When on, sites can save data on your device. When off, sites can’t save data on your device.
Allow a site to save data on your device
Block a site from saving data on your device
Most sites you visit probably save data to your device, often to improve your experience by saving your preferences or information you share with the site. We recommend keeping this setting on.
Sites you visit may stop working as designed

A site you visit can save info about what you’re doing so that it works as expected — for example, to keep you signed in to a site or to save items in your shopping cart. Often sites save this info temporarily on your device.
Sites can save data on your device
Don't allow sites to save data on your device (not recommended)
Don't allow sites to play sound
Features that need sound won't work
Sites might play sound to provide audio for music, videos and other media
%1$s can use your information as you browse
%1$s is blocked from using your information on

Sites you visit can embed content from other sites, for example images, ads, and text. These other sites can ask for permission to use information they've saved about you as you browse the site. <link>Learn more about embedded content</link>
Allow a site to use third-party cookies
Features on some sites may not work
Features on some sites may not work
A site you visit can embed content from other sites, for example, images, ads, and text. Cookies set by these other sites are called third-party cookies.
Sites can ask to connect to USB devices
Don't allow sites to connect to USB devices
Sites usually connect to USB devices for features like printing a document or saving to a storage device
Sites can ask to use virtual reality devices and data
Don't allow sites to use virtual reality devices or data
Sites usually use your virtual reality devices and data to let you enter VR sessions
Sites can ask to manage windows on all your displays
Don’t allow sites to manage windows on all your displays
Sites can use this feature to manage windows on all your displays
This action will delete all local data, including cookies, and reset all permissions for %1$s
The source code of web page can only be executed in web page!
You'll be signed out of all sites
You may be signed out of these sites
You may be signed out of this site
Data that affects ad personalization is deleted
This will delete %1$s of data and cookies stored by sites.
This action will delete all data and cookies for %1$s and all sites under it
This action will delete all data and cookies stored by all sites under %1$s or by its app on your Home screen
This will delete all data and cookies stored by %1$s.
This will delete all data and cookies stored by %1$s or by its app on your Home screen.
This will delete %1$s of data and cookies stored by sites or by apps on your Home screen.
Any offline data will be deleted
has been successfully added to the full screen whitelist

As required by law, some Extensions may infringe the rights and interests of some companies, so we have realized the Extensions white list function, and some page Extensions will not be implemented. Such as: Youku, iqiyi, Tencent video page advertising filtering Extensions can not be implemented
This component is not supported on the current client

It is strongly recommended that you install the X5 kernel to run the plug-in environment. This will not switch your web browsing kernel
installation steps: 1.Click download to go to X5 official installation page, 2.After entering, click Install kernel. Restart as prompted

Online investigation, many users feedback that the default reality is English. At present, the reason is unknown. Opening this can force the designation of Chinese, but I don't know what effect it has. Click OK to force the designation of Chinese.
If the file is larger than this size (XX MB), multithreaded downloading will be used; otherwise, single-threaded

Before you start using, you need to check out the 《Service Agreement》 and 《Privacy Policy》 to understand what's what. Once you get what they're about, make your call. Agreeing means you've read and accepted the terms

[permission description] we are requesting your clipboard to intelligently analyze search terms, links, query Taobao hidden red envelopes, lovers is synchronous viewing, etc. the data will not be recorded and accessed to the cloud, but only used for local analysis. N [detection opportunity] when the application switches from the background to the foreground, click allow / permanent reject, and there will be no prompt. You can select the switch through the Sidebar - more settings
YouTube videos are currently available for donors only
If the video is abnormal, it means the device doesn't support it. Please disable this feature.
Unlock 2K and 4K resolution for YouTube videos.

Yujian search is an integrated search tool. Yujian itself does not provide any data sources, and data are generated by third-party services. The resulting problems have nothing to do with Yu Jianfang. Please contact the corresponding service platform
The cloud synchronization function is turned off. Are you sure you want to turn it on
Your cloud records will be replaced by existing local records. This is irreversible. Are you sure to proceed
%1$s home icon records in the cloud are not synchronized. Do you want to synchronize locally. Cancel cloud configuration
Will return to the browser home page
will display word segmentation and record brief inspiration
open search results only support search engine
The voice search function requires access to your microphone
Due to policy reasons, this page cannot run this plug-in
search engine links must contain placeholders, otherwise they cannot be used normally. Click OK to view the instructions
My website no bad advertisements, but blocked mistake

this browser has been a freshman for five years. I don not want it to be commercialized. But the increasing cost of development is embarrassing. Thank you very much for your help. Some unimportant small function presents, does not become the respect.
